Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Where did those two Shadows come from?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Somewhere outside of Tartarus, just like with the dorm and the monorail.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Um, what are we gonna do about Moriyama-san? She knows about the Dark Hour and the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It doesn't matter. She's not like us, so she won't remember anything that happens in the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}The good news is she didn't fall victim to the Shadows, despite hearing their call.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}So I don't think she'll get drawn in again. She's safe now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But doesn't that mean she'll forget Yamagishi-san saved her life?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Actually, I get the feeling that things will work out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It looks like she's learned her lesson.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It wasn't easy, but we managed[n]to rescue Fuuka Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}His warnings don't seem to be just dreams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I can't make any sense of it right now.[n]I feel way too exhausted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get some rest as soon[n]as I get back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
